title: Cave Dweller ReEvolved
description: Continuation of the Cave Dweller Evolved Mod by SiverDX.
body:
# Cave Dweller ReEvolved
The Cave Dweller is a creature that roams in the caves, waiting for the time to attack its prey. It will make sounds as it gets closer, evidencing its presence.

## Announcement
The 26.1+ ports are on their way! Please, be patient.

## About
This mod is a port of the [Cave Dweller Evolved](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dweller-evolved) Mod, created by SiverDX (Candentem). As this mod was heavily based on his code, all credits goes to him.

Even though this mod is supposed to be a port, it includes some minor tweaks/improvements and adds some features that were never introduced in the Evolved version.

## Credits
**SiverDX (Candentem):** Original author of the Cave Dweller Evolved Mod and of the source-code.

**Schpalrbo:** Author of the model and the animations used for the Cave Dweller.

**Frictional Games and Visceral Games:** Studio responsible for the sounds used for the Cave Dweller (from Dead Space and Soma)
